content:
✨ bluehood | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: To monitor, analyze, and visualize local Bluetooth device activity for educational purposes, raising awareness about Bluetooth privacy and potential metadata leakage.
✨ Key Features: • Continuous scanning for BLE and Classic Bluetooth devices • Device identification by vendor and BLE service UUIDs • Device classification into categories (phones, audio, vehicles, etc.) • Tracking presence patterns with hourly/daily heatmaps
📖 Summary: Bluehood is a Python-based project that monitors and analyzes Bluetooth activity in a local neighborhood. It identifies and classifies nearby Bluetooth devices, tracks their presence patterns over time, and provides a web dashboard for visualization and analysis, aiming to raise awareness about Bluetooth privacy risks.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
